---
title: "Two-Stage Smooth-Then-Differentiate"
author: "Simon Frost"
date: today
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
    toc: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
  gfm:
    toc: true
engine: julia
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.."]
---

## Note

The Two-Stage solver is now covered in [Vignette 09: Gradient Matching](../09_gradient_matching/09_gradient_matching.qmd), which provides a comprehensive comparison of integration-free methods including `GradientMatching`, `AdaptiveGradientMatching`, `TwoStageSolver`, and `BNGSolver`.
